title: CLI supports native GIF and cycle workflows
description:
Feature: CLI supports native GIF and cycle workflows
Scenario: Native subcommands invoke V2 methods
Given a configured CLI invocation
When upload-sequence or play-gif or cycle commands are run
Then the expected Pixoo methods are called with validated arguments

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: CLI now supports native GIF upload/play/cycle workflows with validated argument wiring.
